underlying_goal: Modularize a large FreqTrade shorting strategy into feature modules and iteratively optimize short entry signals through backtesting
friction_detail: FreqTrade's import resolver broke modularized imports repeatedly, hyperopt OOM-killed at 10 workers, and Claude added long entries when user only wanted short optimization.
brief_summary: User wanted to modularize and optimize a FreqTrade shorting strategy; modularization succeeded after import friction, but backtests revealed signals predict direction not magnitude, leaving optimization incomplete.
